sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ لَيْلَى تَخَافُ مِنَ الظَّلَامِ حِينَ كَانَتْ صَغِيرَةً.
sentences.translation: Lejla se bojala mraka kada je bila mala.
sentences.translationEn: Layla used to be afraid of the dark when she was young.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ أَبُوهَا يَجْلِسُ مَعَهَا وَيُحَدِّثُهَا حَتَّى تَنَامَ.
sentences.translation: Otac je sjedio s njom i pričao joj dok ne zaspi.
sentences.translationEn: Her father would sit with her and talk until she fell asleep.

sentences.arabic: كَبِرَتْ لَيْلَى وَلَمْ تَعُدْ تَخَافُ مِنَ الظَّلَامِ.
sentences.translation: Lejla je odrasla i više se nije bojala mraka.
sentences.translationEn: Layla grew up and no longer feared the dark.

sentences.translation: Uvijek se sjeća oca i njegovih lijepih riječi.
sentences.translationEn: She always remembers her father and his kind words.
